text:
Created attachment 214003
Update audio/grip to 4.1.1

Hi,

I've attached a patch to update audio/grip to version 4.1.1.

Changelog
---------

- Patch from Till Bargheer: fix directory creation
- Translation updates:
  Brazilian portuguese, danish, dutch, german 
  italian, korean, norwegian, ukranian

Kind regards,

Jens
